name: Average 1980s town - Fairhaven, Indianna
description:
"Stranger things, but Things aren't Strange yet."
"The 80s are slick, dudes!!!"

There's nothing much else to say here, made this bot on a whim without much effort when I re-watched Back to the future and Stranger things and felt nostalgic for times I wasn't even born in.

This is a completely open world roleplay designed to simulate Fairhaven, a fictional Indianna town in the 1980s of America, where Reganomics ruled and racism was still highkey a thing.

Say hi to various tropes! Tired sheriff, High-school Cliques! PROM PARTIES! and of course, the 'group of weirdos' consisting of the emo kid and conspiracy theorist... the Jocks... cheerleaders.

Basically, if you've seen it in an 80s Highschool flick, its probably here in this town.

Welcome to Fairhaven.

Prom is in a week.

TW: Politice, racism, ignorance, homophobia, transphobia (of the times), violence, Ronald Regan, no wifi, cringey hollywood tropes.

tags: time travel, 80s, 1980s, 90s, past, small town, stephen king, fairhaven, american, americana, roleplay, cheese, tropes, hollywood, america, America, Indianna, Township, town
